description: AI漫剧道具资产库，包含武器、法器、日常物品、特殊道具

fields.name: 道具名称
fields.category: 武器/法器/日常/特殊/交通工具
fields.era_style: 时代/风格（古代/现代/奇幻/科幻）
fields.material: 材质（金属/木质/玉石/布料/水晶等）

entries.name: 示例道具 - 长剑（龙泉）
entries.description: 古风长剑，剑身寒光凛冽，剑鞘黑底银纹
entries.material: 剑身精钢/剑鞘黑檀木镶银
entries.consistency_keywords: 龙泉剑，三尺青锋，银白剑身，黑鞘银纹
entries.prompt_template: A [material] [name], [description], [style], detailed texture, cinematic lighting, product photography style, 8k

entries.name: 示例道具 - 玉佩
entries.description: 圆形白玉佩，系红绳，刻有云纹
entries.prompt_template: Close-up of [name], [material], [description], soft lighting, detailed jade texture, macro photography, 8k

entries.name: 示例道具 - 灯笼
entries.description: 红色纸质灯笼，竹骨框架，暖光透出
entries.prompt_template: A traditional [name], [material], warm glow emanating from inside, [environment], cinematic lighting, atmospheric, 8k
